dragonflydb/dragonfly#7069.blurb: Exposed replication link status, sync progress, and replica offset via the /metrics endpoint for Prometheus-based alerting.

dragonflydb/dragonfly#5944.blurb: Redesigned the RDB serialization format for scalable bloom filters to remove a hard 256 MB cap by segmenting filter data into variable-size chunks.

dragonflydb/dragonfly#5726.blurb: Implemented GEORADIUSBYMEMBER_RO — read-only geospatial radius query by member name.

dragonflydb/dragonfly#5678.blurb: Implemented GEORADIUS_RO — read-only geospatial radius query by coordinate.

dragonflydb/dragonfly#5503.blurb: Corrected BLMPOP journaling behaviour and option parsing to match Redis semantics.

dragonflydb/dragonfly#5370.blurb: Added BLMPOP — blocking-pop across multiple lists with timeout and count support.

MariaDB/server#4720.blurb: Refactored Optional_metadata_fields to replace parallel std::vector columns with a Column_metadata struct, consolidating per-column binlog metadata and simplifying charset handling.
